Author: Klara
Name: Quartermaster
Punchline: FFXIV Economy Intelligence Engine — profit alerts, market analysis, and IPC orchestration.
Description: Consolidates market, crafting, retainer, and submarine profit data into one always-available dashboard. Evaluates profitability continuously against a user-defined watchlist and emits actionable alerts. Orchestrates actions across other Dalamud plugins (Artisan, AutoRetainer, GatherBuddyReborn) via IPC — always with user approval.
